about.text: Software developer based in Barcelona. Skilled in the React and Next.js ecosystem, with a focus on front-end development but a full-stack perspective. I integrate AI into my development workflow to adapt to any technology or context.

atbcn.title: atbcn.info
atbcn.shortDescription: Collaborative calendar of cultural events in Barcelona
atbcn.fullDescription: An app to stay up to date on local events. Explore events in your city, view key details, add your own events, and enjoy an intuitive interface. Built with Next.js App Router, React Server Components, and Supabase as a BaaS. Includes a moderation system for event validation, integration with the Anthropic API for scraping, and PWA for a native app experience.

plants.title: Plants App
plants.shortDescription: This app uses the OpenAI API to identify and analyze plants based on an image.
plants.fullDescription: This app uses the OpenAI API to identify and analyze plants based on an image. The system returns the name, description, care difficulty, watering frequency, light requirements, and ideal temperature. Identified plants are saved in a database and can be viewed or deleted later.

intrathecapp.title: Intrathecapp
intrathecapp.shortDescription: A web application that calculates medication doses for pharmaceutical use.
intrathecapp.fullDescription: Frontend of a web application that calculates medication doses for patients. The calculator's logic was implemented using OOP in JavaScript. The backend is built with Django, the frontend with React using Hooks and Context for state management, and PWA for data persistence. The application is currently on standby in a private repository, but you can see how it works by clicking on the demo video below.

getoutbcn.title: GetOutBCN (WIP)
getoutbcn.shortDescription: A collaborative database of interesting places in Barcelona built with React Native. Under construction using OpenCode as a development agent and SDD methodology.
getoutbcn.fullDescription: Work in progress. A mobile app for a collaborative geolocalized directory in Barcelona. Under construction with Spec-Driven Development methodology and OpenCode as the code agent. This project documents a workflow with AI: from specification to implementation.
